character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A former chieftain who quickly shifts plans, passes a pistol to Jim, and directs others during a conflict. Demonstrates strategic movement and calm under pressure.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: A first-person narrator who receives a pistol from Silver and observes the conflict between Silver and others.

character_dossiers.name: Morgan
character_dossiers.biography: A buccaneer who reacts to finding gold with oaths and participates in the conflict.

character_dossiers.name: Merry
character_dossiers.biography: A buccaneer who challenges Silver, leads a charge, and is killed by musket fire.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: A participant who fires musket shots, kills Merry, and joins the group with the doctor and Ben Gunn.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: A leader who coordinates the group, directs actions, and recounts events to Silver and others.

character_dossiers.name: Gray
character_dossiers.biography: A companion who assists the doctor and participates in the group's movements.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: A maroon who joins the group, interacts with Silver, and is recognized as a hero by Silver.
